basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website annauniv.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/ B.Tech in Biotechnology/ Bioinformatics (OR/AND) M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology/ Computational Biology/ Bioinformatics (OR) M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Computational Biology/ Bioinformatics
qualification.details: B.E/ B.Tech in Biotechnology/ Bioinformatics (OR/AND) M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology/ Computational Biology/ Bioinformatics (OR) M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Computational Biology/ Bioinformatics

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Experience & Qualification Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 01-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech in Biotechnology/Bioinformatics, or M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology/Computational Biology/Bioinformatics, or M.Sc in Biotechnology/Computational Biology/Bioinformatics.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to submit a hard copy of your application along with your curriculum vitae to the Director, Centre for Biotechnology, Anna University, Chennai.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by Anna University for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their experience and qualifications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q9. How should I superscribe the envelope for the application?
faq.answer: The envelope must be superscribed as "Application for Project Assistant CMRG Project, Centre for Biotechnology, Anna university".

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this position?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is strictly for offline applications. Online applications will not be accepted.
